name: Jordan Ellis
notes: Covers emerging pop artists with 50k+ monthly listeners. Prefers radio-ready production.

name: Aaliyah Morgan
notes: Focuses on lyricism and storytelling. Strong preference for independent artists.

name: Declan Foley
notes: Breaks undiscovered artists. Pitch 2 weeks before release. Include SoundCloud or private Spotify link.

name: Simone Vega
notes: Looks for vocal performance and production quality. Strong storytelling a must.

name: Marcus Bell
notes: Curates for the electronic music channel. Must have official music video or lyric video.

name: Priya Nair
notes: Guitar-driven indie. Prefers bands over solo artists but exceptions made for strong debuts.

name: Theo Marchetti
notes: Authentic storytelling required. Supports traditional and progressive country equally.

name: Yuki Tanaka
notes: Open to modern jazz interpretations. Looks for strong musicianship and originality.

name: Fatima Al-Hassan
notes: Represents 40+ genres globally. Must have authentic cultural connection to genre.

name: Connor Walsh
notes: Covers the full rock spectrum. Looking for energy, hooks, and strong live presence.

name: Amara Diallo
notes: Runs a respected indie blog with 120k monthly readers. Accepts 1-2 pitches/week. Include press photo.

name: Tyler Rowe
notes: Independent playlist with 280k followers. Responds well to emotional, late-night listening tracks.

name: Sofia Reyes
notes: Writes features and premiere posts. Needs EPK and streaming link. 3-week lead time preferred.

name: Ethan Clarke
notes: 175k followers. Curates calm, acoustic music for morning listening. No drums or heavy production.

name: Nadia Okonkwo
notes: Strong connection to West African music scene. Prefers artists with African roots.

name: James Thornton
notes: UK-based editorial. Cover features for artists with UK touring plans. 4-week lead time.

name: Maya Singh
notes: 210k followers. Covers South Asian music. Bilingual pitches appreciated.

name: Lucas Ferreira
notes: 320k followers. Spanish-language pitches preferred. Must have music video for consideration.

name: Hannah Fitzgerald
outlet: The Line of Best Fit — Premieres
notes: High-profile UK blog. Song premiere feature comes with interview. 3-week exclusivity.

name: David Kim
notes: 190k followers. Covers Korean artists or international artists with K-pop influence.

name: Rachel Santos
notes: 260k followers. Very genre-specific — no crossover pop. Include Beatport or SoundCloud link.

name: Oliver Grant
notes: Complex blog feature section. Lifestyle-forward branding. Include artist bio and social stats.

name: Zoe Hartley
notes: Editorial playlist. Prefers pitches with release date confirmed. 2-week lead minimum.

name: Samuel Osei
notes: 145k followers. Faith-based content only. No crossover without clear spiritual message.

name: Leila Ahmadi
notes: 200k followers. BPM range 80–110. Instrumental or minimal vocals preferred.

name: Ben Okafor
notes: 155k followers. African production roots required. DJ sets and remixes accepted.

name: Clara Johansson
notes: 120k followers. Scandinavian artists or artists with clear Nordic aesthetic influence.

name: Marcus Webb
notes: 170k followers. Independent country artists prioritised over major label acts.

name: Aisha Kamara
notes: 130k followers. Emotional depth and vocal performance are primary selection criteria.

name: Patrick Dunn
notes: UK metal/rock editorial. Touring history required. Bio must include live show details.

name: Tanya Mills
notes: 85k followers. Casual blogger who curates for mood. Responds to personal emails well.

name: Andre Bouchard
notes: 60k followers. French or French-influenced music only. Bilingual pitches preferred.

name: Keisha Brown
notes: 75k followers. Energy and production quality are top criteria. Must have clean and explicit versions.

name: Tom Fletcher
notes: Small but engaged UK blog. Will write features for strong pitches. Responds within 2 weeks.

name: Rosa Mendez
notes: 90k followers. Spanish-language content primarily. Must have a dance-oriented video.

name: Chris Patel
notes: 110k followers. High-energy tracks only. BPM 120–160. Drop must hit within 90 seconds.

name: Isabelle Noir
notes: 45k followers. Very niche taste. No pop crossover. Responds to detailed production notes.

name: Jerome Banks
notes: 95k followers. Nostalgic boom bap vibes. New artists must have authentic connection to classic era.

name: Nina Kovacs
notes: 70k followers. Late-night atmospheric music. Reverb-heavy production is a plus.

name: Patrick Lam
notes: 55k followers. Mandarin or Cantonese language tracks. Simplified and traditional Chinese bios help.

name: Destiny Okafor
notes: 50k followers. Faith-based African music community. Live worship recordings accepted.

name: Erik Johansson
notes: 65k followers. DJ-friendly edits preferred. Must provide WAV for consideration.

name: Alicia Turner
notes: 80k followers. Upbeat, feel-good tracks only. Seasonal curating — most active April–August.

name: Mo Adeyemi
notes: 100k followers. UK-based artists preferred. Must have authentic connection to the scene.

name: Ling Wei
notes: 120k followers. No lyrics preferred. Binaurals and sound healing accepted. Zero marketing tone.

name: Fabio Rossi
notes: 40k followers. Italian language tracks only. Based in Milan — supports live events in Italy.

name: Tunde Adeleke
notes: 45k followers. Nigerian heritage music. Traditional roots with modern production gets attention.

name: Carla Ruiz
notes: 38k followers. Authentic flamenco lineage required. Innovation within tradition welcomed.

name: James Odell
notes: 72k followers. DIY ethos is non-negotiable. Major label deals are an automatic pass.

name: Sophia Chen
notes: 88k followers. Home-recorded aesthetic is a plus. Strong hooks over production polish.
